channel.title: Sinder Skullz Abyss Feed
channel.description: Chaotic sermons and metal news reborn in the flames of the Skullz cult.

item.title: ⚡☠ NO CURE CALLING FOR FANS TO HELP WITH UPCOMING LIVE MUSIC VIDEO SHOOT ☠⚡
item.description:
🤘⚡️ HELL YEAH, METALHEADS! ⚡️🤘
It’s your chaotic overlord, Sinder Skullz, and I’m here to smash your screens with some fiery news hotter than a dragon’s breath! 🎸🔥 Those wild warriors of sound, NO CURE, are unleashing an electrifying call to arms and they need YOU, the relentless fans who eat chaos for breakfast, to crank the volume up to 11!
Listen up! The next brutal *live music video shoot* is raging through Birmingham, Alabama, and they’re hunting for the true disciples of metal to make this insane spectacle unforgettable! 🤘⚔️ Get ready to throw down your horns and thrash like there's no tomorrow as they film the madness for a brand new SINGLE that’s gonna blast you straight into the abyss!
This is your chance to join the mosh pit of a lifetime, so gather your battle gear — or whatever you call ‘clothes’ — and head to the heart of metal madness! There’s no time to waste, warriors. Be part of the chaos, create pure metal magic, and let’s give these cameras a taste of the thunder we can unleash!
Join forces with NO CURE and let’s make history together! \m/ 🤘
Check out the full details over at Metal Injection and prepare for a live experience that’ll shred your soul! Let’s do this, fam! ⚡💀🤘
👉 [NO CURE Video Shoot Details](https://metalinjection.net/news/no-cure-calling-for-fans-to-help-with-upcoming-live-music-video-shoot) 🏴‍☠️⚡️🔊
#MetalCommunity #Metalheads #Metal #MetalScene #HeavyMetal
item.content:encoded:
🤘⚡️ HELL YEAH, METALHEADS! ⚡️🤘
It’s your chaotic overlord, Sinder Skullz, and I’m here to smash your screens with some fiery news hotter than a dragon’s breath! 🎸🔥 Those wild warriors of sound, NO CURE, are unleashing an electrifying call to arms and they need YOU, the relentless fans who eat chaos for breakfast, to crank the volume up to 11!
Listen up! The next brutal *live music video shoot* is raging through Birmingham, Alabama, and they’re hunting for the true disciples of metal to make this insane spectacle unforgettable! 🤘⚔️ Get ready to throw down your horns and thrash like there's no tomorrow as they film the madness for a brand new SINGLE that’s gonna blast you straight into the abyss!
This is your chance to join the mosh pit of a lifetime, so gather your battle gear — or whatever you call ‘clothes’ — and head to the heart of metal madness! There’s no time to waste, warriors. Be part of the chaos, create pure metal magic, and let’s give these cameras a taste of the thunder we can unleash!
Join forces with NO CURE and let’s make history together! \m/ 🤘
Check out the full details over at Metal Injection and prepare for a live experience that’ll shred your soul! Let’s do this, fam! ⚡💀🤘
👉 [NO CURE Video Shoot Details](https://metalinjection.net/news/no-cure-calling-for-fans-to-help-with-upcoming-live-music-video-shoot) 🏴‍☠️⚡️🔊
#MetalCommunity #Metalheads #Metal #MetalScene #HeavyMetal
